title: Ask VEPai Recommendation Output
description: Structured output of the Ask VEPai recommender. Maps each per-option decision to the Ensembl VEP web form (web_form_section + web_form_field name attribute) for click-to-apply, plus the CLI equivalent, provenance and the deterministic constraint-check result.

assembly.description: Inferred assembly if stated (e.g. GRCh38, GRCm39); null if unknown.

web_form_section.description: One of the 6 canonical CONFIG_SECTIONS ids (VEPConstants.pm).

web_form_field.description: The HTML control 'name' attribute in InputForm.pm to target for click-to-apply. Native fields: the id itself (symbol, hgvs, af_gnomade...). Plugins: 'plugin_<Key>' (e.g. plugin_CADD). Restrict-results values: 'summary'. Transcript db: 'core_type'. Species-scoped controls are suffixed at runtime: 'regulatory_<Species>', 'cell_type_<Species>' (e.g. regulatory_Homo_sapiens).

action.description: enable/disable for checkboxes; set_value for dropdowns/radiolists/strings (then 'value' is required).

value.description: Target value for set_value actions, e.g. sift='b', core_type='refseq', summary='most_severe', distance='1000', frequency='common'. Null for plain enable/disable.

cli_flag.description: Equivalent VEP CLI flag, e.g. '--af_gnomade', '--plugin CADD', '--most_severe'.

source.description: Provenance tag tracing to the KB entry, format '[source: option_id]'.

reason.description: Why this option is recommended for this scenario, grounded in the KB.

constraint_check.description: Result of the deterministic post-hoc constraint checker (species, conflict, dependency).

passed.description: True if no violations remained after auto-correction.

generated_command.description: Ready-to-run vep CLI command reflecting the final (post-constraint-check) option set.
